parameters.query:
INSERT INTO jobs (job_key, company_id, company_display, title_raw, title_normalized, location_raw, location_normalized, source, source_url, posting_id, term, role_family, match_tags, match_score, status, filter_reason, first_seen_at, last_seen_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.job_key }}', '{{ $json.company_id }}', '{{ $json.company_display }}', '{{ $json.title_raw }}', '{{ $json.title_normalized }}', '{{ $json.location_raw }}', '{{ $json.location_normalized }}', '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.source_url }}', '{{ $json.posting_id }}', '{{ $json.term }}', '{{ $json.role_family }}', '{{ $json.match_tags }}', {{ $json.match_score }}, '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ $json.filter_reason }}', '{{ $json.first_seen_at }}', '{{ $json.last_seen_at }}')
ON CONFLICT(job_key) DO UPDATE SET
  last_seen_at = excluded.last_seen_at,
  source_url = CASE WHEN excluded.source = 'careers_page' THEN excluded.source_url ELSE jobs.source_url END,
  source = CASE WHEN excluded.source = 'careers_page' THEN 'careers_page' ELSE jobs.source END
WHERE jobs.status NOT IN ('submitted', 'rejected_by_user', 'pending_approval');
